name: The Birdie Bay
about: The Birdie Bay is an indoor golf venue offering a premier simulator experience using cutting-edge TrackMan technology. It features state-of-the-art simulators with a curated selection of over 300 world-renowned courses, providing a realistic and accurate playing environment. The venue offers flexible memberships for regular play and is available for private events, corporate outings, and casual gatherings. With a focus on both entertainment and serious game improvement, it serves golfers of all skill levels in a comfortable, inviting setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by advanced TrackMan iO technology for unparalleled accuracy and real-time data
Access to over 300 world-renowned golf courses for varied and engaging play
Flexible membership options offering discounted rates and advanced booking

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar, infrared, and high-speed imaging technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, but it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time required for 18 holes, but typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website mentions clinics for golfers of all ages and skills, but does not specifically state if it is kid-friendly for general play.
